sign: Таблички 7.6.2–7.6.6 «Спосіб поставлення транспортного засобу на стоянку» (parking-method plates; apply only to passenger cars and motorcycles)
reason: Official ПДР question image (infotech.gov.ua / web.testpdr.com QNS_4787) shows 4 parking-method plates of the 7.6.x family, each depicting a car positioned on/at a curb. Verified by reading the file: 4 black-on-white tablichky with car silhouettes on a sidewalk edge. Matches correct answer 5 — only legkovi avtomobili and motocykly may park here, since plates 7.6.2-7.6.6 apply solely to cars and motorcycles.
